seoTitle: How to Create a Countdown Timer in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to create a countdown timer in Canva to build urgency for product launches, sales, and event promotions.
intro: Countdown timers add urgency to marketing content, encouraging viewers to act before time runs out on a launch, sale, or event. Canva includes tools to build this kind of dynamic element into your designs. This guide covers setting one up.

steps.heading: Search for countdown elements
steps.body: In the Elements panel, search 'countdown timer' to find graphics and app integrations built for this purpose.

steps.heading: Add the countdown to your design
steps.body: Drag the countdown element onto your canvas, positioning it where you want it to appear.

steps.heading: Set the target date and time
steps.body: Enter the date and time your countdown should end, matching your event or promotion deadline.

steps.heading: Style the timer to match your design
steps.body: Adjust colors, fonts, and sizing so the countdown fits with the rest of your branding.

steps.heading: Publish or export your design
steps.body: Share the design as a live link if you want the countdown to update in real time, or export a static version for a specific moment.

faq.question: Does the countdown timer update automatically once published?
faq.answer: Yes, if shared as a live Canva link, the timer counts down in real time; a downloaded image or video will be a fixed snapshot.

faq.question: Is the countdown timer element free to use?
faq.answer: Basic countdown elements are available for free, though some styled versions may be part of Canva Pro.

faq.question: Can I use a countdown timer in a video design?
faq.answer: Yes, countdown elements can be added to both static designs and video projects.

faq.question: Can I change the countdown's end date after publishing?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit the element's settings and republish to update the target date.
